name: Insurance guy called after my job forklift injury, what shouldn't I say?
description: Don't admit fault, exaggerate/minimize injuries, sign anything—get lawyer first.

mainEntity.name: Insurance guy called after my job forklift injury, what shouldn't I say?

acceptedAnswer.text: Don't admit fault, exaggerate/minimize injuries, sign anything—get lawyer first.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Say little—'refer to my attorney' only; never admit fault or downplay injuries.** They seek to minimize payout.[3] Key factors: Recorded calls twist words; delayed symptoms appear minimized. Get lawyer first before statements. This avoids claim sabotage.
